summary: Bug fix verification for planning notification issue: Notifications were being sent even when planning was in draft mode (brouillon). All 11 tests passed, confirming the fix is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Line 314: Assignation model now defaults to publication_status='brouillon' - VERIFIED
Lines 480-519: Creation logic checks if month has published assignments. If yes → 'publie', if no → 'brouillon' - VERIFIED
Lines 505-519: Notification only sent when pub_status == 'publie' - VERIFIED
Lines 576-636: Deletion notification only sent when assignation.publication_status == 'publie' - VERIFIED
Lines 651-700: Publish endpoint changes brouillon → publie and sends notifications - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Test data created in future month 2026-08 to avoid interfering with existing data. Cleanup performed after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Planning notification bug fix verified. Key tests: (1) Create assignment in unpublished month → 'brouillon' status, no notification. (2) Create assignment in published month → 'publie' status. (3) Delete brouillon → no notification. (4) Delete published → notification sent. (5) Publish planning → status changes to 'publie'. Use admin credentials gussdub@icloud.com for testing planning features.

BUG_1_CREATE_UNPUBLISHED_MONTH.description: Create assignment in unpublished month should get 'brouillon' status and NOT create notification

BUG_2_CREATE_PUBLISHED_MONTH.description: Create assignment in already published month should get 'publie' status

BUG_3_DELETE_BROUILLON.description: Delete brouillon assignment should NOT create notification

BUG_4_PUBLISH_PLANNING.description: Publish planning should change status to 'publie' and send notifications

BUG_5_MODEL_DEFAULT.description: Assignation model should default to publication_status='brouillon'

BUG_6_VISIBILITY_FILTERING.description: Non-admin users should not see brouillon assignments
